species.bodyType: round pudgy proportions, big head, tiny arms, short stubby legs, chubby tail

primary.name: mint green
primary.description: soft mint-green skin over body, head and tail

secondary.name: pale yellow
secondary.description: pale-yellow belly and small back spikes

coloring.pattern: smooth skin with a row of soft rounded pale-yellow back spikes

landmarks.name: eyes
landmarks.description: huge round shiny dark eyes, innocent and curious

landmarks.name: spikes
landmarks.description: row of soft rounded plates along the back

landmarks.name: teeth
landmarks.description: two tiny baby teeth in a small smile
